name: feat-09-dark-mode
initialPrompt: Half our users work at night and are begging for dark mode. I want: a system-preference-aware default (prefers-color-scheme), a manual toggle in the user settings, the preference synced to the user account so it roams across devices, and all existing UI components updated to support both themes. Make sure charts and images also work in dark mode. We use Tailwind so the implementation approach matters — figure out the right strategy.

blocks.text: Deliver a polished dark mode that respects system preference and roams with the user account
successCriteria: no flash of unstyled content on load
preference synced across devices within 5 s
all UI components pass WCAG AA contrast in both modes

blocks.question: Which Tailwind dark mode strategy: 'media' or 'class'?
blocks.rationale: Class strategy allows manual override; media strategy does not.

blocks.title: Define dark-mode colour tokens and update Tailwind config
acceptance: all semantic colour tokens have dark variants

blocks.title: Implement system-preference detection and initial theme application
acceptance: theme applied before first paint (no FOUC)

blocks.title: Build manual dark/light/system toggle in user settings
Audit and update all UI components for dark mode
acceptance: all components in Storybook render correctly in dark mode

blocks.description: Flash of unstyled content if theme class applied after first paint
blocks.mitigation: Inline blocking script in <head> reads localStorage and sets class before render

blocks.question: Should images get a brightness/contrast CSS filter in dark mode, or do we curate dark variants for each?

blocks.description: Flash of unstyled content if theme class applied after first paint; SSR complicates inline script approach

idChangedButCorresponding.note: Same risk (FOUC on theme load) but description expanded to cover SSR complexity; id changed. AC-13 fallback must map risk-fouc to risk-fouc-v2.

decoy.note: Genuinely-new block. Shares surface tokens 'dark mode' and 'component' with task-component-audit. A comment on task-component-audit must re-attach to task-component-audit (id preserved), NOT this new visual regression task.

notes: Renumbering pressure: task-theme-spike inserted second (shifts all subsequent positions); task-dark-mode-e2e added; risk-fouc id changed. Naive positional scheme loses alignment at task-theme-tokens onward. Denominator is 7.
